INVALID_CONFIG: Simulation parameters are invalid. Please check the settings and try again.
SIMULATION_ERROR: The simulation engine reported an error. See details below.
TIMEOUT: Simulation timed out. Try shortening the duration or reducing parameters.
BINARY_NOT_FOUND: Simulator executable not found. Please run npm run build:simulator first.
NO_EXEC_PERMISSION: Simulator executable is not executable (permission denied).
PARSE_ERROR: Failed to parse simulation result. The simulator binary may be outdated.
